title: Red Hat Security Advisory: resource-agents security update
overview:
An update for resource-agents is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Update Services for SAP Solutions and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: resource-agents security update

An update for resource-agents is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Update Services for SAP Solutions and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for resource-agents is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Update Services for SAP Solutions and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
resource-agents-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.src.rpm
resource-agents-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-debuginfo-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-debugsource-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-paf-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.ppc64le.rpm
resource-agents-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-aliyun-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-aliyun-debuginfo-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-debuginfo-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-debugsource-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-gcp-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm
resource-agents-paf-4.9.0-40.el8_8.14.x86_64.rpm

CVE-2025-66418: urllib3 is a user-friendly HTTP client library for Python. Starting in version 1.24 and prior to 2.6.0, the number of links in the decompression chain was unbounded allowing a malicious server to insert a virtually unlimited number of compression steps leading to high CPU usage and massive memory allocation for the decompressed data. This vulnerability is fixed in 2.6.0.
